title: KandyToys UV Beach Parasol Tilting Sunshade 34" Rib Parasol with PVC Carry Bag
features: Beach Parasol: Perfect for adding extra shade and sun protection on beach trips or in the garden.
Tilting, Adjustable Pole: Shade and protection from the sun no matter the time of day. The adjustable height and tilt allows you to position the parasol to create a shady space just right for you.
Traditional: the parasol features a bright pattern. A summer seaside classic!
UV Parasol: Protection from harmful UV rays is important, this beach parasol is made of UV protective fabric to help keep your skin safe, as well as making the fabric more durable.
Easy to Transport: The beach parasol comes with a PVC carry bag, making storing and transporting the parasol super simple.
description: Garden/Beach Tilting Parasol, 1.6m This is a polyester beach parasol (5.3ft/1.6m diameter), ideal for a holiday or the garden. It has an adjustable pole, max. height of the parasol is 190cm. This tilt umbrella will give added shade throughout the day as the suns rays change. Complete with plastic tips and caps, 8 ribs and PVC carry bag. With SILVER COATING to the underline fabric for sun protection UPF40. The silver coating also makes the fabric more durable.
